Off Calendar Feb-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SUTTER BAY HOSPITALS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

Off calendar. Notice of settlement filed on 1/16.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Form Interrogatories (Set One) And Special Interrogatories (Set One); Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Oct-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MARK NESSIM's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Form Interrogatories (Set One) And Special Interrogatories (Set One).

Plaintiff Mark Nessim's Motion to Compel Defendant Sutter Bay Hospitals' Further Responses to Form and Special Interrogatories, Set Number One is GRANTED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Samuel K. Feng, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/SKF)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Form Interrogatories (Set One) And Special Interrogatories (Set One); Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Sep-29-2025 Continued To Oct-13-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference:
Stephen Ilg.; Esq., of ILG Legal Office, P.C., Tel: (415) 580-2574 for plaintiff.
Jennifer Puza, Esq., of HANSON BRIDGETT LLP. Tel: 415-777-3200 for defendant.

Hearing required. Appearances for both parties were made via Zoom. The purpose of the appearance was to allow for judicial disclosure.The Court disclosed that, prior to appointment to the bench, it was previously affiliated with other Law Firm. The Court further stated that it does not maintain any financial or personal relationship with any individual associated with that firm.Following the disclosure, the Court ask both parties to raise any questions or concerns regarding the disclosure on the record. Both parties indicated that they had no questions regarding the disclosure.

PLAINTIFF MARK NESSIM's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Form Interrogatories (Set One) And Special Interrogatories (Set One) is continued to October 13, 2025, at 9:00AM in Dept. 302, a date to which both parties stipulated they are available.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
